---
title: "sps_heatmap_analysis 3.0"
author: "Shiori"
date: "2025-09-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggplot2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db) 
library(reshape2)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(heatmaply)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(venndir)
library(textshaping)

source("../Rscript/utils_heatmap_modified.R")
```

```{r}
dir<-"../demo_data/expected_output/"
output_dir<-paste0(dir, "fig/")


# data_input
s <- read.xlsx(paste0(dir, "sps_pattern_result.xlsx"), "pattern_result")
w <- read.xlsx(paste0(dir, "whole_pattern_result.xlsx"),"pattern_result")

w <- w %>%
    mutate(igot_cluster = ifelse(igot_cluster == 2, "decre", igot_cluster)) %>%
    mutate(igot_cluster = ifelse(igot_cluster == 1, "incre", igot_cluster)) %>%
    mutate(igot_cluster = ifelse(igot_cluster == "decre", 1 , igot_cluster)) %>%
    mutate(igot_cluster = ifelse(igot_cluster == "incre", 2, igot_cluster))

```

# select and add features
- select columns 
- add glycan structural information
- add correlation ratio for sites (gpep-igot)
```{r}
w_ext <- w %>% select_cols() %>% add_glycan_structural_info() %>% add_cor_ratio_by_site()
s_ext <- s %>% select_cols() %>% add_glycan_structural_info() %>% add_cor_ratio_by_site()

```


```{r}


whole_cor_df<-data_cor_select(w_ext, "gpep_cluster", TRUE, 0.6, "acc_site_ID", FALSE, 0)
sps_cor_df<-data_cor_select(s_ext, "gpep_cluster", TRUE, 0.6, "acc_site_ID", FALSE, 0)
whole_noncor_df<-data_cor_select(w_ext, "ratio_cluster", FALSE, 0.6, "acc_site_ID", FALSE, 0)
sps_noncor_df<-data_cor_select(s_ext, "ratio_cluster", FALSE, 0.6, "acc_site_ID", FALSE, 0)

whole_venn<-venn_analysis(whole_cor_df, whole_noncor_df, "acc")
sps_venn<-venn_analysis(sps_cor_df, sps_noncor_df, "acc")

whole_venn_site<-venn_analysis(whole_cor_df, whole_noncor_df, "acc_site_ID")
sps_venn_site<-venn_analysis(sps_cor_df, sps_noncor_df, "acc_site_ID")

whole_venn_gpep<-venn_analysis(whole_cor_df, whole_noncor_df, "acc_site_glycan_ID")
sps_venn_gpep<-venn_analysis(sps_cor_df, sps_noncor_df, "acc_site_glycan_ID")

saveRDS(whole_venn, paste0(output_dir, "cor_whole_acc_venn.rds"))
saveRDS(sps_venn, paste0(output_dir, "cor_sps_acc_venn.rds"))
saveRDS(whole_venn_site, paste0(output_dir, "cor_whole_site_venn.rds"))
saveRDS(sps_venn_site, paste0(output_dir, "cor_sps_site_venn.rds"))
saveRDS(whole_venn_gpep, paste0(output_dir, "cor_whole_gpep_venn.rds"))
saveRDS(sps_venn_gpep, paste0(output_dir, "cor_sps_gpep_venn.rds"))

whole_cor_acc<-extract_items(whole_venn@label_df, "correlation")
whole_noncor_acc<-extract_items(whole_venn@label_df, "non_correlation")
sps_cor_acc<-extract_items(sps_venn@label_df, "correlation")
sps_noncor_acc<-extract_items(sps_venn@label_df, "non_correlation")


whole_cor_heatmap_df<-w_ext %>%
                      filter( acc %in% whole_cor_acc)
whole_noncor_heatmap_df<-w_ext %>%
                      filter( acc %in% whole_noncor_acc)
sps_cor_heatmap_df<-s_ext %>%
                      filter( acc %in% sps_cor_acc)

sps_noncor_heatmap_df<-s_ext %>%
                      filter( acc %in% sps_noncor_acc)



w_ext_cor<-whole_cor_heatmap_df
s_ext_cor<-sps_cor_heatmap_df
w_ext_ncor<-whole_noncor_heatmap_df
s_ext_ncor<-sps_noncor_heatmap_df



```

# GO Term / Sort Key
```{r}
# GO enrichment analysis of IGOT-derived changes
set.seed(2025)
w_go_cor <- GO_term(w_ext_cor, "CC")
s_go_cor <- GO_term(s_ext_cor, "CC")
w_go_ncor <- GO_term(w_ext_ncor, "CC")
s_go_ncor <- GO_term(s_ext_ncor, "CC")

#Glycan_sort_list
w_cor_heatmap_input <- sort_key(w_go_cor, "Category")
s_cor_heatmap_input <- sort_key(s_go_cor, "Category")
w_ncor_heatmap_input <- sort_key(w_go_ncor, "Category")
s_ncor_heatmap_input <- sort_key(s_go_ncor, "Category")


write.xlsx(w_cor_heatmap_input, paste0(dir, "CC_whole_cor.xlsx"))
write.xlsx(s_cor_heatmap_input, paste0(dir,"CC_sps_cor.xlsx"))
write.xlsx(w_ncor_heatmap_input, paste0(dir,"CC_whole_noncor.xlsx"))
write.xlsx(s_ncor_heatmap_input, paste0(dir,"CC_sps_noncor.xlsx"))

```

# make heatmaply
```{r}
w_cor_heatmap_output <- heatmaply_fig(w_cor_heatmap_input, "gpep_cluster")
s_cor_heatmap_output <- heatmaply_fig(s_cor_heatmap_input, "gpep_cluster")
w_ncor_heatmap_output <- heatmaply_fig(w_ncor_heatmap_input, "ratio_cluster")
s_ncor_heatmap_output <- heatmaply_fig(s_ncor_heatmap_input, "ratio_cluster")

# htmlwidgets::saveWidget(s_ncor_heatmap_output, paste0(output_dir, "CC_sps_ncor_restrict.html"))
# htmlwidgets::saveWidget(s_cor_heatmap_output, paste0(output_dir, "CC_sps_cor_restrict.html"))
# htmlwidgets::saveWidget(w_ncor_heatmap_output, paste0(output_dir, "CC_whole_ncor_restrict.html"))
# htmlwidgets::saveWidget(w_cor_heatmap_output, paste0(output_dir, "CC_whole_cor_restrict.html"))
 
```
